title: Polynomial, Rational, and Nonlinear Models · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Compare alternative growth and geometry models for a production process. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a nonlinear model comparison report after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Relate polynomial degree, roots, multiplicity, end behavior, and turning points.
Fit and critique polynomial models without extrapolating unsupported behavior.
Interpret zeros, holes, asymptotes, and domain restrictions in rational models.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
